action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline UNet trained 5 epochs, val RMSE Z500=1.1688 (normalized). Need actual raw metric on test set. Analysis: Eval contract uses raw predictions, metric rmse_z000 will be on raw units. Submitting eval of best checkpoint to establish baseline. Decision: Submit eval with iteration 1 best checkpoint, no training changes.
